# North Shore Pool Boys
## CPO-Certified Pool & Hot Tub Service — Peabody, MA & the North Shore

> North Shore Pool Boys is a CPO-certified pool and hot tub service company based in Peabody, Massachusetts. We serve 21 towns across the North Shore including Danvers, Beverly, Salem, Saugus, Lynnfield, Middleton, and surrounding communities.

## Services
- Weekly Pool Maintenance (from $80/week)
- Pool Openings (from $125)
- Pool Closings / Winterization (from $175)
- Pool Repair (cracks, tile, pipe, equipment)
- Pool Pump Repair ($150 service call)
- Pool Heater Repair & Installation
- Pool Filter Repair & Installation
- Pool Liner Replacement & Repair
- Pool Skimmer Repair
- Leak Detection & Trenchless Pipe Repair
- Above-Ground Pool Installation
- Safety Cover Installation (mesh & solid)
- Saltwater Pool Service & Conversions
- Hot Tub Maintenance & Repair
- Pool Water Chemistry & Testing

## Contact
- Phone: (978) 882-5932
- Email: northshorepoolboys@gmail.com
- Address: 22 May St, Peabody, MA 01960
- Hours: Mon–Sat 8am–7pm
- Website: https://www.northshorepoolboys.com

## Service Areas
Peabody, Danvers, Middleton, Beverly, Salem, Saugus, Lynnfield, Marblehead, Swampscott, Lynn, Wakefield, Reading, North Reading, Topsfield, Wenham, Hamilton, Nahant, Georgetown, Boxford, Essex, Ipswich

## Certifications
- CPO (Certified Pool Operator) Certified
- Fully Insured
- BusinessRate Best Pool Cleaning Service — Southern New England 2025 & 2026
